title: Introduction to Widget Config
Troubleshooting Widget Config
body:
## Common Configuration Issues

This article covers frequent pitfalls during Widget Config setup and provides solutions.

### 1. Invalid JSON Schema

If the configuration fails silently, verify the JSON validity. Use the built-in validator:

```javascript
const result = widget.config.validate('/etc/widget/config.json');
if (!result.valid) {
  console.error('Config errors:', result.errors);
}
```

### 2. Missing Environment Overrides

When mixing file-based config with environment variables, ensure the override prefix is set correctly in the Widget config flow. For example, `WIDGET_` prefix should be defined in the bootstrap code.

### Configuration Flow Check

Always confirm the configuration flow is complete before calling `widget.start()`. Partial configuration can cause "Uninitialized" errors.

### Related Articles

- Introduction to Widget Config (ART-901)
- Advanced Widget Config (ART-903)
